compact_conversation_messages: compact older conversation messages into a summary to prevent context window overflow
check_compaction_needed: check if the current message list has exceeded the token threshold requiring compaction
extract_state_capsule: extract a deterministic state capsule from a batch of conversation messages including file events and tool usage
render_state_capsule: render a state capsule dictionary into a continuation-friendly text block for the LLM
estimate_message_tokens: estimate the total token count across a list of messages including text tool calls and tool results
